name: Single Asset Interest Rate Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the change in a single asset's value due to a specified percentage change in interest rates, given the asset's sensitivity.

inputs.name: asset_value
inputs.description: The initial value of the asset.

inputs.name: interest_rate_change_percent
inputs.description: The percentage change in interest rates (e.g., 5 for a 5% change).

inputs.name: asset_sensitivity
inputs.description: The asset's sensitivity to changes in interest rates.

name: Stock Price Sensitivity to Market Index Change
short_description: Calculates the expected change in a stock's price based on its sensitivity to a market index change.

inputs.name: stock_price
inputs.description: Current price of the stock.

inputs.name: market_change
inputs.description: Percentage change in the market index (e.g., 2 for 2%).

inputs.name: sensitivity
inputs.description: The sensitivity (beta-like factor) of the stock price to the market index change.

name: Multi-asset Portfolio Interest Rate Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the change in a multi-asset portfolio's value due to an interest rate change, considering individual asset weights and sensitivities.

inputs.name: pv
inputs.description: Current total value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: aw1
inputs.description: Weight of asset 1 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 25 for 25%).

inputs.name: aw2
inputs.description: Weight of asset 2 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 25 for 25%).

inputs.name: aw3
inputs.description: Weight of asset 3 in the portfolio (as a percentage, e.g., 25 for 25%).

inputs.name: s1
inputs.description: Sensitivity of asset 1 to a 1% change in interest rates.

inputs.name: s2
inputs.description: Sensitivity of asset 2 to a 1% change in interest rates.

inputs.name: s3
inputs.description: Sensitivity of asset 3 to a 1% change in interest rates.

inputs.name: ir_change_pct
inputs.description: Change in interest rates (as a percentage, e.g., 0.5 for a 0.5% increase).

name: Option Vega Sensitivity to Volatility Change
short_description: Calculates the expected change in an option's value due to a specified change in the underlying asset's volatility, using the option's Vega.

inputs.name: vega
inputs.description: Option's Vega, representing the change in option value for a 1% change in volatility.

inputs.name: vol_change
inputs.description: Change in the underlying asset's volatility (in percentage points, e.g., 5 for 5%).

name: Multi-Factor Portfolio Sensitivity
short_description: Calculates the total change in a portfolio's value due to simultaneous changes in multiple risk factors (interest rates, market index, credit spreads), considering its sensitivities to each.

inputs.name: portfolio_value
inputs.description: Current market value of the portfolio.

inputs.name: interest_rate_change
inputs.description: Percentage change in interest rates (e.g., 1 for 1% change).

inputs.name: market_change
inputs.description: Percentage change in the market index (e.g., 2 for 2% change).

inputs.name: credit_spread_change
inputs.description: Percentage change in credit spreads (e.g., -0.5 for -0.5% change).

inputs.name: sensitivity_interest
inputs.description: Portfolio's sensitivity (beta) to interest rate changes.

inputs.name: sensitivity_market
inputs.description: Portfolio's sensitivity (beta) to market index changes.

inputs.name: sensitivity_credit
inputs.description: Portfolio's sensitivity (beta) to credit spread changes.
